task_completion.description: Agent is in the GovernanceMeeting session.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser URL bar shows 'http://localhost:8080/GovernanceMeeting' and the Jitsi Meet interface is loaded.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the participants list to identify users.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The participants pane is visible on the screen, showing the list of people currently in the meeting.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the context menu to remove the disruptive user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A context menu (usually accessed via three dots) is open next to 'DisruptiveUser' in the participants list or on their video tile, showing an option like 'Kick out', 'Remove', or similar.

task_completion.description: The disruptive user is successfully removed from the meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'DisruptiveUser' is no longer visible in the participants list or the main video grid in the later screenshots.

task_completion.description: The agent remains in the meeting after removing the user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the Jitsi Meet interface is still active with the agent ('Moderator') present. The browser tab has not been closed, and the agent has not clicked the 'Leave meeting' button.

integrity.description: Agent used the browser GUI to remove the user.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse clicks and UI interactions are visible in the Jitsi Meet web interface, rather than terminal commands being used to kill processes.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Jitsi Meet application.
integrity.visual_evidence: A standard web browser displaying the Jitsi Meet UI is used, not a text editor or developer tools console manipulating the DOM directly.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply leave the meeting or close the browser to make the user disappear from view.
integrity.visual_evidence: The meeting UI remains visible and active at the end of the trajectory; the agent did not click the red hang-up/leave button or close the browser window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The meeting takes place in Jitsi Meet at the URL 'http://localhost:8080/GovernanceMeeting'. The agent's display name is 'Moderator' and the user to be removed is exactly named 'DisruptiveUser'.
